title: astragalus bolanderi
intro: Astragalus bolanderi, also known as Bolander's milkvetch, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It belongs to the legume family and is a type of root, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. Astragalus bolanderi is valued for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms associated with chronic diseases such as arthritis and diabetes. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its health benefits.
